div.head: The Minister in Iraq (Henderson) to the Secretary of State
div.p: 251. Tahsin Qadri, Iraqi Minister at Beirut now in Baghdad, told me today that the new Soviet Minister to Syria and the LebanonDaniil Semenovich Solod. has told him in confidence that the Soviet Government is unqualifiedly opposed to the Zionist program. ReDept’s circular infotel November 14, 6 [10] p.m.Not printed. In reply to an inquiry from the Department, the Minister to Syria and Lebanon (Wadsworth) in telegram 277, December 6, 4 p.m., stated that he had been informed by the Iraqi Minister that the Soviet Minister had told him that the Soviet Union would do nothing to support Zionism. Mr. Wadsworth expressed confidence in the Iraqi Minister’s statement. Wadsworth is undoubtedly in a better position than I to evaluate the reliability of the Iraqi Minister.
